channel.title: The Preditorium Prophecy — Blog
channel.description: News, the young-author story, and reading guides for The Preditorium Prophecy: The Golden Statue.

item.title: How a 13-Year-Old Wrote a Fantasy Novel
item.description: The story behind The Preditorium Prophecy: building a world, creating the Ascendants, and finishing a debut novel at 13.

item.title: Is The Preditorium Prophecy Right for Your Reader? A Parent's Guide
item.description: Reading age, themes, content notes and who this middle-grade fantasy adventure is for.
